safe_prefix: Work only in this Boltons checkout. Do not use the network, install packages, modify dependency files, or ask questions.

procedures.title: Boltons Read-Only Draft Editing and Successful Turns

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/iterutils.py and tests/test_iterutils.py. Do not edit files. Report the definition line and test line for pairwise, then end with ST01-A`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: No process or file action yet

operations.instruction: Append the literal nine characters ` WINDOWED`
Press `Backspace` exactly nine times
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Draft authority remains current; no terminal result

operations.instruction: Press `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Response cites both files, ends with `ST01-A`, and `git status --short` remains empty
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Explicit-input authority; active then one success

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/strutils.py and tests/test_strutils.py. Do not edit files. Report the definition line of parse_int_list and two existing test inputs. End with ST01-B`
Press `Left` once
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Cursor is immediately before the final `B`

operations.instruction: Type the literal `EDITED-`
Press `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Response ends with `ST01-EDITED-B`; worktree remains clean
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Fresh active turn then one success

operations.instruction: Type `/` without submitting
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Conservative overlay state; no success settlement

operations.instruction: Press `Escape`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Slash menu closes and empty editor returns
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Ready posture returns without a new outcome

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/urlutils.py only. Do not edit files. Name the URL class and the find_all_links function. End with ST01-C`
Press `Ctrl+U`
Retype operation 11 exactly
Press `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Response ends with `ST01-C`; worktree remains clean

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/fileutils.py and tests/test_fileutils.py. Do not edit files. State the default keep value of rotate_file and end with ST01-D`
Send `Space Space Backspace Backspace` as one recorded key sequence
Press `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Response reports `keep=5`, ends with `ST01-D`, and worktree remains clean

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read pyproject.toml only. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST01-E PYTHON>=3.7`
Press `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Visible response contains exactly `ST01-E PYTHON>=3.7` as its substantive answer

operations.instruction: Press `Escape` once at the empty ready editor
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Final success remains current; no new authority or outcome

procedures.title: Boltons Interruption, Steering, Recovery, and Re-Interruption

operations.instruction: Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/iterutils.py, boltons/dictutils.py, boltons/urlutils.py, and their matching test files. Do not edit files. Produce at least 40 numbered bullets, each naming one public symbol, its definition line, and one tested behavior. End with ST02-A`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Agent begins multi-file inspection; worktree remains clean

operations.instruction: While turn 1 is active, type without submitting: `Steer: cover iterutils.py first and put pairwise, windowed, and backoff in the first three bullets.`
Press `Enter`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Steer handoff remains active; no terminal result

operations.instruction: After one post-steer active frame, press `Ctrl+C` once
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Interrupted result 1; exactly one terminal interruption

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Re-read boltons/iterutils.py and tests/test_iterutils.py. Do not edit files. Produce 30 numbered behavior examples for pairwise, windowed, and backoff. End with ST02-RECOVERY-A`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Interruption clears under fresh draft authority

operations.instruction: Press `Enter`
After the first visible response line while still active, press `Ctrl+C` once
Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read pyproject.toml only. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST02-B PYTHON>=3.7`
Press `Enter` and wait for ready

Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read every Python module directly under boltons/ and every test_*.py file directly under tests/. Do not edit files. Produce a module-to-test coverage table with at least 35 rows and end with ST02-C`
While turn 4 is active, type without submitting: `Steer: sort the coverage table alphabetically and include cacheutils.py, iterutils.py, strutils.py, and urlutils.py first.`
Press `Ctrl+U`
Type without submitting: `Steer: instead group the table into data structures, iteration, text, files, time, and networking.`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Editing returns without new terminal state

operations.instruction: Press `Enter`
After one post-steer active frame, press `Ctrl+C` once
Type `/` without submitting
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Overlay does not revive interruption as activity

operations.instruction: Press `Escape`
Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read README.md and CHANGELOG.md only. Do not edit files. Reply with the current package name and end with ST02-RECOVERED`
Press `Enter` and wait for ready
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Response ends with `ST02-RECOVERED`; worktree remains clean

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/cacheutils.py next, but do not start until I submit this draft.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: No tool starts and no file changes
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Final state is editing `yes` with no extra outcome

procedures.title: Concrete Unattended Boltons Tool and Edit Workflow

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Use terminal tools now. Run pwd and git status --short. Do not edit files. Reply with the working-directory basename, the status output, and ST03-01.`
`{{SAFE}} Read pairwise and windowed in boltons/iterutils.py and their tests in tests/test_iterutils.py. Do not edit files. Report their definition and test line numbers, then end with ST03-02.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Both source and test files are read; status remains empty
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Fresh active turn and one success

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Create tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. It must import pairwise from boltons.iterutils and define test_pairwise_contract asserting pairwise([1, 2, 3]) == [(1, 2), (2, 3)]. Modify no other file. End with ST03-03.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: New file exists with one import and one test
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Write is unattended; active then success

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Do not edit files. Report the pass count and end with ST03-04.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Command exits zero with one passing test
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Command remains active until one success

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Edit only tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Add windowed to the boltons.iterutils import and add test_windowed_contract asserting windowed([1, 2, 3, 4], 3) == [(1, 2, 3), (2, 3, 4)]. End with ST03-05.`
`{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Do not edit files. Report the pass count and end with ST03-06.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Command exits zero with two passing tests

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Read parse_int_list in boltons/strutils.py and its existing tests in tests/test_strutils.py. Do not edit files. Report one ascending and one descending range example, then end with ST03-07.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Both files are read; test file unchanged

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Edit only tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Import parse_int_list from boltons.strutils and add test_parse_int_list_contract asserting parse_int_list('3,1,5-7') == [1, 3, 5, 6, 7]. End with ST03-08.`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Edit is unattended and settles once

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Do not edit files. Report the pass count and end with ST03-09.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Command exits zero with three passing tests
operations.tracker_checkpoint: No stale blocked or prior result

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Read find_all_links in boltons/urlutils.py and its tests in tests/test_urlutils.py. Do not edit files. Report its with_text option and end with ST03-10.`

`{{SAFE}} Edit only tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Import find_all_links from boltons.urlutils and add test_find_all_links_contract asserting [str(url) for url in find_all_links('see https://example.com/a')] == ['https://example.com/a']. End with ST03-11.`
`{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Do not edit files. Report the pass count and end with ST03-12.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Command exits zero with four passing tests

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Create docs/houmao-long-horizon.rst with exactly seven lines in this order: 'Houmao Long-Horizon Notes', '=========================', one blank line, '* pairwise: adjacent pairs', '* windowed: sliding tuples', '* parse_int_list: integer ranges', and '* find_all_links: URL discovery'. Modify no other file. End with ST03-13.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Documentation file has the exact seven requested lines

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run sha256sum docs/houmao-long-horizon.rst. Do not edit files. Reply with the 64-character digest and ST03-14.`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Command turn has one terminal outcome

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Edit only docs/houmao-long-horizon.rst. Append a blank line and the exact line 'Validation command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py'. End with ST03-15.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Exact validation line is present once

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py tests/test_iterutils.py tests/test_strutils.py tests/test_urlutils.py. Do not edit files. Report the exit status and pass count, then end with ST03-16.`
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Long command remains active until one success

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run git status --short and read tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py and docs/houmao-long-horizon.rst. Do not edit files. In chat, give exactly three plan steps for adding a pairwise end-value test, then end with ST03-17.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Status shows only the two declared untracked files; no change occurs during planning
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Plan response requires no approval or user answer

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Apply the plan by editing only tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py. Add test_pairwise_end_contract asserting pairwise([1], end=None) == [(1, None)]. End with ST03-18.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Test file contains five named tests

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run git diff --no-index /dev/null tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py and git diff --no-index /dev/null docs/houmao-long-horizon.rst. Exit status 1 is expected because both files are new. Summarize only the two paths and five test names. Do not edit files. End with ST03-19.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Both no-index diffs show only the declared files

operations.instruction: `{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_houmao_long_horizon.py and git status --short. Do not edit files. Report five passing tests, both changed paths, and ST03-20.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Five tests pass; status lists only the declared new files

procedures.title: Boltons UI Overlays, Resize, and Stale Scrollback

operations.instruction: Type `/` without submitting
Press `Down` once
Press `Up` once
Press `Escape`
Type `{{PLACEHOLDER_LITERAL}}` without submitting
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Literal appears as user-entered editor text

operations.instruction: Press `Ctrl+U`
Run `tmux resize-window -t {{PANE}} -x 72 -y 24`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Pane is exactly 72 columns by 24 rows
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Wrapping does not fabricate activity or interruption

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read README.md only. Do not edit files. Reply with the upstream URL in the Houmao Vendored Test Fixture section and end with ST04-A`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Draft is visible in narrow pane

operations.instruction: Press `Enter` and wait for ready
Run `tmux copy-mode -t {{PANE}}` followed by `tmux send-keys -t {{PANE}} -X page-up` as one control event
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Tracker remains conservative about copied scrollback

operations.instruction: Run `tmux send-keys -t {{PANE}} -X cancel`
Run `tmux resize-window -t {{PANE}} -x 120 -y 36`
Send the key sequence `/model Enter` as one navigation event
Press `Down` once
Press `Escape`

Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/cacheutils.py, boltons/dictutils.py, boltons/iterutils.py, boltons/strutils.py, and their matching tests. Do not edit files. Produce 30 numbered bullets comparing their public APIs and end with ST04-B.`
After the first visible response line while active, press `Ctrl+C` once
Run `tmux resize-window -t {{PANE}} -x 88 -y 28`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Pane is exactly 88 by 28 while interruption evidence remains

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read pyproject.toml only. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST04-RECOVERED`
Press `Enter` and wait for ready
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Active then one success; stale scrollback does not contaminate it

procedures.title: Mixed Boltons Session with Downstream Consumption and Restart

operations.instruction: Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read README.md only. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST05-A BOLTONS`
Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Read pyproject.toml and report the minimum Python version. End with ST05-B`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Draft visible; no tools started yet
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Success clears under new draft authority

operations.instruction: Press `Enter` and wait for ready
Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read every Python file directly under boltons/ and produce at least 35 numbered bullets mapping modules to representative public symbols. Do not edit files. End with ST05-C`
After the first visible response line while active, press `Ctrl+C` once
Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Run git status --short. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST05-D CLEAN if the output is empty.`
Press `Enter` and wait for ready
Type `/` without submitting
Press `Escape`
Submit: `{{SAFE}} Use terminal tools now. Create houmao_artifacts/st05.txt with exactly the line 'boltons long horizon state'. Modify no other file. End with ST05-E.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: File exists with exact one-line content

operations.instruction: Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read houmao_artifacts/st05.txt and run sha256sum on it. Do not edit files. Reply with its exact content, the digest, and ST05-E-READ.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Visible content and digest match file

operations.instruction: Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read boltons/fileutils.py, boltons/iterutils.py, boltons/strutils.py, and their tests. Do not edit files. Produce 25 numbered comparison bullets and end with ST05-F.`
While operation 12 is active, type without submitting: `Steer: put atomic_save, pairwise, windowed, parse_int_list, and human_readable_list in the first five bullets.`
Press `Enter` and wait for final ready
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Steer is accepted; no files change
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Still active, then exactly one success

operations.instruction: Type without submitting: `{{SAFE}} Run python -m pytest -q tests/test_fileutils.py tests/test_iterutils.py tests/test_strutils.py. Report the exit status and end with ST05-G.`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Draft visible; tests not started yet

operations.instruction: Press `Ctrl+U`
Retype operation 15 exactly
Press `Enter` and wait for ready
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Targeted tests exit zero and response ends `ST05-G`

operations.instruction: At the empty ready editor, press `Ctrl+D` once
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Provider exits to the owned shell; copied project remains
operations.tracker_checkpoint: `tui_down`; old turn anchor absent or lost; no stale admission

operations.instruction: At the shell prompt, send expanded `{{LAUNCH_COMMAND}}` followed by `Enter`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Same provider restarts in same pane and working directory without a prompt
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Conservative startup/unknown then ready; old success not resurrected

operations.instruction: Submit: `{{SAFE}} Read houmao_artifacts/st05.txt. Do not edit files. Reply exactly ST05-H boltons long horizon state`
operations.engineering_checkpoint: Restarted process reads the pre-restart artifact
operations.tracker_checkpoint: Fresh authority, active, then one success
